info.name: Calculator - Newman Chain v3 (Grouped by Operation)
info.description:
Newman Chaining Collection — dikelompokkan per operasi.
  Urutan folder: Multiply → Divide → Add → Subtract
  Chain: hasil POST tiap folder jadi nilai 'a' di folder berikutnya.
  GET (query param & path variable) pakai nilai dari hasil POST folder sebelumnya.
  Nilai b tetap 5 di semua step. Nilai awal: a=10, b=5.
  Logging: request header, request body, response header, response body, duration.
Generated: springboot-generator MCP v7.0

item.name: Perkalian (Multiply)
item.description:
Folder Multiply — 3 cara input. Nilai awal a=10, b=5.
Hasil POST akan menjadi nilai 'a' di folder Divide.

exec: pm.test('[1a][Multiply] ' + inputA + ' x ' + inputB + ' = ' + (inputA * inputB), function () {

request.description:
POST via Request Body. Nilai awal a=10, b=5.
Hasil → multiplyResult → jadi nilai a di Divide.

exec: pm.test('[1b][Multiply] ' + inputA + ' x ' + inputB + ' = ' + (inputA * inputB), function () {

request.description: GET via Query Param. Nilai a=10, b=5 (nilai awal, sama seperti POST).

exec: pm.test('[1c][Multiply] ' + inputA + ' x ' + inputB + ' = ' + (inputA * inputB), function () {

request.description: GET via Path Variable. Nilai a=10, b=5 (nilai awal, sama seperti POST).

item.name: Pembagian (Divide)
item.description:
Folder Divide — 3 cara input.
Nilai a = multiplyResult (hasil POST Multiply), b=5.
Hasil POST akan menjadi nilai 'a' di folder Add.

request.description:
POST via Request Body. a = multiplyResult, b=5.
Hasil → divideResult → jadi nilai a di Add.
GET via Query Param. a = multiplyResult (hasil POST Multiply), b=5.
GET via Path Variable. a = multiplyResult (hasil POST Multiply), b=5.

item.name: Penjumlahan (Add)
item.description:
Folder Add — 3 cara input.
Nilai a = divideResult (hasil POST Divide), b=5.
Hasil POST akan menjadi nilai 'a' di folder Subtract.

request.description:
POST via Request Body. a = divideResult, b=5.
Hasil → addResult → jadi nilai a di Subtract.
GET via Query Param. a = divideResult (hasil POST Divide), b=5.
GET via Path Variable. a = divideResult (hasil POST Divide), b=5.

item.name: Pengurangan (Subtract)
item.description:
Folder Subtract — 3 cara input.
Nilai a = addResult (hasil POST Add), b=5.
Ini adalah folder terakhir — menampilkan ringkasan akhir di step 4a.

request.description: POST via Request Body. a = addResult, b=5. FINAL step chain.
GET via Query Param. a = addResult (hasil POST Add), b=5.
GET via Path Variable. a = addResult (hasil POST Add), b=5.
